macro.title: S&P 500 slips from record, Nasdaq falls as OpenAI report knocks chip stocks: Live updates - CNBC
macro.summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite fell on Tuesday, weighed down by a report that pointed to weakness in OpenAI as well as a rise in oil prices.

A split within the Fed impedes Trump’s deregulation of Wall Street - The Washington Post
macro.summary: Ideological divides are slowing the central bank’s decision-making and could pose a challenge for the president’s nominee to run the Federal Reserve, Kevin Warsh.

macro.title: UAE leaves OPEC and OPEC+ - Al Jazeera
macro.summary: Announcement comes as Gulf producers are already struggling to ship exports through the Strait of Hormuz.
